sequence.name: Open Lid
sequence.notes: Lid hinges at front edge, swings open toward viewer and over

sequence.name: Fold Down All Side Panels
sequence.notes: All 4 panels fold simultaneously, hinge at bottom edge, fold outward to lay flat. Panels are connected like a cardboard box with fold lines. Tripods are attached to panels and deploy with them.

sequence.name: Deploy Side Struts
sequence.notes: Struts extend to hold panels in open/flat position

sequence.name: Insert Stiffeners
sequence.notes: 8 bracing stiffeners slide into slots - separate pieces inserted into position

sequence.name: Flip Open Shelf with TV
sequence.notes: Shelf (Hylde) is hinged inside the box and flips upward, carrying the TV with it

sequence.name: Move PC to Final Position
sequence.notes: PC slides/moves to its final position on the right side

sequence.name: Deploy Feet
sequence.notes: 5 feet stored inside the box move to their final positions

sequence.name: Place Keyboard and Mouse
sequence.notes: Keyboard and mouse move out from inside the box and are placed in their working positions

sequence.name: Extend Robot Arm
sequence.notes: Robot arm is already upright inside the box - extends its joints to working position

colors.enhancements: Add PBR properties (metallic, roughness) to STEP colors for realistic rendering
